mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, url, keywords, enabled, max_items, created_at FROM news_source
SELECT id, name, type, url, keywords, enabled, max_items, created_at FROM news_source WHERE enabled = true
SELECT id, name, type, url, keywords, enabled, max_items, created_at FROM news_source WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news_source (name, type, url, keywords, enabled, max_items) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{url}, #{keywords}, #{enabled}, #{maxItems})
